\subsection{services.urls module}
\label{\detokenize{services:module-services.urls}}\label{\detokenize{services:services-urls-module}}\index{module@\spxentry{module}!services.urls@\spxentry{services.urls}}\index{services.urls@\spxentry{services.urls}!module@\spxentry{module}}
\sphinxAtStartPar
URL configuration for services project.
\begin{description}
\sphinxlineitem{The \sphinxtitleref{urlpatterns} list routes URLs to views. For more information please see:}
\sphinxAtStartPar
\sphinxurl{https://docs.djangoproject.com/en/6.0/topics/http/urls/}

\end{description}

\sphinxAtStartPar
Examples:
Function views
\begin{enumerate}
\sphinxsetlistlabels{\arabic}{enumi}{enumii}{}{.}%
\item {} 
\sphinxAtStartPar
Add an import:  from my\_app import views

\item {} 
\sphinxAtStartPar
Add a URL to urlpatterns:  path(‘’, views.home, name=’home’)

\end{enumerate}
\begin{description}
\sphinxlineitem{Class\sphinxhyphen{}based views}\begin{enumerate}
\sphinxsetlistlabels{\arabic}{enumi}{enumii}{}{.}%
\item {} 
\sphinxAtStartPar
Add an import:  from other\_app.views import Home

\item {} 
\sphinxAtStartPar
Add a URL to urlpatterns:  path(‘’, Home.as\_view(), name=’home’)

\end{enumerate}

\sphinxlineitem{Including another URLconf}\begin{enumerate}
\sphinxsetlistlabels{\arabic}{enumi}{enumii}{}{.}%
\item {} 
\sphinxAtStartPar
Import the include() function: from django.urls import include, path

\item {} 
\sphinxAtStartPar
Add a URL to urlpatterns:  path(‘blog/’, include(‘blog.urls’))

\end{enumerate}

\end{description}
